customCommands.name: email
customCommands.description: Run the email digest dry-run (collect + extract + trending, no HTML/email)
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest digest run ${input} --dry-run

customCommands.name: email-send
customCommands.description: Run digest fully (generates HTML + emails to self)
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest digest run ${input}

customCommands.name: email-candidates
customCommands.description: List Gmail candidates matching a topic
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest digest candidates ${input} --max-results 10

customCommands.name: unsub
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest unsubscribe check
